igbo.toggle_studio_tour: Gbanye ma ọ bụ gbanyụọ njem studio
igbo.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Nnọọ na Studio Nka na Nhazi!
igbo.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Nyochaa ngwá ọrụ 15 nwere mmekọrịta nke na-akụzi echiche agba, nka mgbakọ na mwepụ, nhazi na-emepụta ihe, na nnweta ohere nke anya. Taabụ ọ bụla bụ kanvas nka dị iche. Nke a bụ ihe ị nwere ike ịmepụta:
igbo.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Nyochaa ohere agba HSL site na mmekọrịta
igbo.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Gwakọta agba site na echiche agba mwepụ
igbo.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Mepụta nka pixel na kanvas grid
igbo.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Sere site na nhata ntụgharị na nke enyo
igbo.mathematical_spiral_patterns_hypotroch: Ụkpụrụ gburugburu nke mgbakọ na mwepụ (hypotrochoids)
igbo.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Ubi mmiri, ntakịrị ihe, ubi kpakpando, aurora
igbo.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Ise ihe ntụgharị nke kọmputa nwere physics
igbo.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Ụkpụrụ taịlị na-emegharị dịka nke M.C. Escher
igbo.mandelbrot_julia_sets_sierpinski_trian: Mandelbrot, ụyọkọ Julia, akụkụ atọ Sierpinski
igbo.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Haziere ma bupụ ụkpụrụ gradient CSS
igbo.harmony_desc: Nyochaa nkwekọ egwu, oghere ụda, na mmekọrịta dị n'etiti ụda na ihe a na-ahụ anya
igbo.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Ihe nlele ndịiche WCAG maka nnweta ohere
igbo.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Echiche agba (ngwakọta mgbakwunye megide mwepụ, agba mmejupụta, HSL/RGB), akụkụ mgbakọ na mwepụ (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals na ịyị onwe ya, jiometrị nkedo taịlị, nghọta anya nke Op Art, ụkpụrụ nnweta ohere WCAG, na nka kọmputa. Ngwá ọrụ ọ bụla na-akụzi mgbakọ na mwepụ dị n'azụ ịma mma ahụ.
igbo.color_wheel_hsl_hsv_complementary_pair: Wiil Agba — HSL/HSV + ụzọ abụọ mmejupụta
igbo.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 gburugburu wiil ahụ), saturation (ọcha), ìhè. Ndị mmejupụta na-eche onwe ha ihu, ndị yiri onwe ha dị nso, ndị atọ dị 120° n'ebe ọ bụla. Newton tinyere ìhè na wiil n'afọ 1666.
igbo.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Ihe Ngwakọta Agba — mwepụ megide mgbakwunye
igbo.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Agba na mbipụta = mwepụ (CMY na-agwakọta ruo ọchịchịrị); ìhè na ihuenyo = mgbakwunye (RGB na-agwakọta ruo ọcha). Otu ụwa, mana mgbakọ na mwepụ dị iche kpamkpam — igwe mbipụta na-eche n'efere K, telivishọn na-eche na Hz.
igbo.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Nka Pixel — ọrụ aka bitmap site na 8×8 ruo 32×32
igbo.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Pixel ọ bụla bụ mkpebi a kpachaara anya mee. A maara sprites NES maka itinye dike n'ime 16×16 site na palet agba 4. Algorithm ahịrị nke Bresenham na-ese ahịrị mgbagọ n'enweghị ọnụọgụ ntụpọ.
igbo.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Akụkụ abụọ (enyo), ntụgharị (ugboro n), ntụpọ. Otu 17 nke ụkpụrụ mgbidi na-ekewa ụkpụrụ 2D ọ bụla na-emegharị — ọrụ Escher niile.
igbo.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Obere okirikiri na-atụgharị n'ime nnukwu, pensụl dịkwa n'ebe dị anya site n'etiti. Ọnụọgụgụ nke redii abụọ na-ekpebi ọnụọgụ petal; ebe dị anya na-ekpebi ịdị arọ. E nyere ihe ngwuri egwu a ikike na 1965, mana mgbakọ ya sitere na 1700.
igbo.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Nmepụta — algorithm + ihe na-adịghị eche eche dịka onye na-ese ihe
igbo.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt dere ntuziaka; onye rụrụ ọrụ na mgbidi bụ onye na-emezu ya. Taa: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Onye na-ese ihe bụ iwu ahụ, ọ bụghị nsonaazụ ya.”
igbo.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Nka Ntụgharị — physics ike na-adọta n'etiti n'ime agba
igbo.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Tụsa agba, tụgharịa, lee ka ọ na-agbasa n'èzí n'ụdị gburugburu. Damien Hirst nwetara nde ego site n'ire ihe osise ntụgharị. Otu physics ahụ dịka igwe mmiri salad; F = mω²r.
igbo.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Nka Eriri — akụkụ sitere n'ahịrị kwụ ọtọ
igbo.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Jikọọ ntu n ọ bụla; akụkụ envelop ga-apụta. Mary Everest Boole webatara nke a dịka mgbakọ na mwepụ ụlọ akwụkwọ n'ihe dị ka afọ 1900. Cardioid nke ahịrị kwụ ọtọ ka na-atọ ụtọ.
igbo.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Ubi moiré nke Bridget Riley, grid nke Vasarely. Sel ọnụ nke ụbụrụ na-achọpụta mmegharị na-agba ọkụ karịa akarị na ndịiche na-agbanwe ngwa ngwa — peeji ahụ na-adị ka ọ na-*ama jijiji*.
igbo.tessellation_the_17_wallpaper_groups: Nkedo Taịlị — otu 17 nke ụkpụrụ mgbidi
igbo.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Nkedo taịlị 2D ọ bụla na-emegharị na-adaba n'otu n'ime otu nhata 17 ahụ. Escher chọpụtara nke a mgbe ọ gara Alhambra na 1936; o wee were afọ 30 na-emecha katalọg ahụ.
igbo.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — na-eyi onwe ya n'ogo ọ bụla
igbo.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Kolịflawa, ikpere oke osimiri, akwara ọbara, amụma, obere akpa ngụgụ — ha niile bụ fractal. “Igwe ojii abụghị bọọlụ, ugwu abụghị konu, ogbugbo osisi adịghịkwa nro.”
igbo.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS na-enye gị gradient ahịrị, okirikiri, na conic. Egwurugwu nke ezie nwere ìhè na-aga n'ihu (enweghị ọkwa dị iche iche) — “agba 7 nke egwurugwu” bụ nhọrọ Newton nke aka ya maka ihe gbasara egwu.
igbo.stereogram_3d_from_a_flat_page: Stereogram — 3D sitere na peeji dị larịị
igbo.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Mmasị Magic Eye nke afọ 90. Anya ọ bụla na-ahụ ụdị gbanwere ntakịrị; ọ bụrụ na ị gafere ma ọ bụ kewaa anya gị nke ọma, ụbụrụ gị ga-ejikọta ha ka ha bụrụ omimi. Ihe dị ka 5% ndị mmadụ enweghị ike n'ezie — ọ bụghị mmejọ ha.
igbo.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: ederede nkịtị 4.5:1, nke buru ibu 3:1. Ihe kpatara ndịiche dị ala ji emerụ ndị na-ahụ ụzọ nke ọma ahụ, ọbụlagodi na ị nwere ike ịgụ ya. APCA (onye nọchiri WCAG 3.0) na-eji ìhè nghọta, ọ bụghị ọnụọgụgụ ìhè nkịtị.
igbo.harmony_lab_hint: Tụnyere oghere ụda ndị kwekọrọ na ndị na-ekwekọghị, jikọọ ọnụọgụgụ ugboro ụda na ụkpụrụ, ma tụgharịa mmekọrịta egwu ka ọ bụrụ nkwekọ nke anya.
igbo.click_the_wheel_to_pick_a_hue: Pịa wiil ahụ ị họrọ hue
igbo.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: na-emegharị ụkpụrụ gburugburu otu ntụpọ etiti. N'ime
igbo.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , azụ kpakpando (ugboro 5), ntakịrị snoo (ugboro 6), na ifuru na-egosi nke a ebe niile.
igbo.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Ụkpụrụ taịlị, blanket akwa, mosaic ala.
igbo.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Ntakịrị snoo, ụlọ aṅụ, ụkpụrụ kpakpando Alakụba.
igbo.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Nka mandala, windo rozis n'ime nnukwu ụka.
igbo.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Nka jiometrị Alakụba na-eji nhata okirikiri nke ukwuu. Ihe ike Celtic, akwa Navajo, na akara ezinụlọ Japan (“mon”) niile dabere na nhata ntụgharị.
igbo.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: na-eji nhata akụkụ abụọ (nke enyo) — ụdị a na-ahụ n'ihu mmadụ, na abụba, na akwụkwọ osisi. Ọ bụ nhata a kacha ahụ n'ụwa anụmanụ.
igbo.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: na-agbagharị n'ìhè agba ka ị na-ese, na-emepụta mmetụta mandala yiri gradient n'onwe ya.
igbo.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Nkịta ọhịa aja aja ọsọ ọsọ na-awụ elu nkịta umengwụ
igbo.sculpt_failed: Ịpị ihe adaghị — nwaa nkọwa dị mfe karị.
igbo.sculpt_canvas: Nlele ihe àpị 3D. Dọrọ ka ị tụgharịa.
igbo.sculpt_title: Jiri ọdịdị ndị bụ isi pịa ihe
igbo.sculpt_create_ph: Ma ọ bụ kọwaa ihe ị chọrọ ịpị…
igbo.sculpt_ai_label: Kọwaa ihe àpị ma ọ bụ mgbanwe
igbo.sculpt_gallery_empty: Ihe àpị echekwara ga-apụta ebe a.
igbo.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Ndịiche kacha elu. Pop art, akara ụlọ ọrụ.
igbo.triadic_3_equidistant: 🔺 Atọ (3 nwere otu ebe dị anya)
igbo.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Na-egbuke egbuke mana nwere nguzozi. Akwụkwọ ụmụaka, katuun.
igbo.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Palet bara ụba nwere ụzọ abụọ na-emegide onwe ha.
igbo.analogous_low_saturation_neighbors: 🌅 Ndị yiri onwe ha (agbata obi nwere saturation dị ala)
igbo.calm_harmonious_landscape_painting: Dị jụụ, kwekọrọ — ihe osise ala.
igbo.energetic_playful_childrens_design: Nwere ike, na-egwu egwu — nhazi ụmụaka.
igbo.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Gbanwee hue bụ isi, saturation, ndịiche ìhè, ntụgharị, na nha palet. Ngwá ọrụ a na-egosi palet nkwekọ ozugbo ma na-ekewa ya n'otu n'ime ụdị nkwekọ 5 dị iche iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe — kpụga ma hụ nchikota ndị na-emepụta nkwekọ dị iche iche.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Echiche (ederede efu — ọ dịghị azịza ziri ezi): Gịnị na-eme ka palet dị ka nke kwekọrọ karịa nke na-agbagwoju anya?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ ghe oghe (enweghị azịza)
igbo.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Ajụjụ ghe oghe — nyochaa site n'ịgbanwe:
igbo.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Chọta palet kacha nta nke ka na-adị gị ka nke "zuru oke".
igbo.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Ndị na-ese ihe impressionist n'ezie jiri palet ndị yiri onwe ha. Gịnị mere ọ ga-abụ otú ahụ?
igbo.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Ụfọdụ nhazi agba nwere aha kwesịrị ekwesị (mmejupụta, mmejupụta kewara ekewa, atọ). Chọta ha ma gbalịa imepụta ha ọzọ.
igbo.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation dị elu + ọtụtụ agba = ọgbaghara. Gbalịa ibelata saturation site na slider ngwakọta — gịnị na-eme "nkwekọ"?
igbo.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Echere m na aghọtala m nkwekọ agba ugbu a — ka m kọwaa ya n'okwu nke m
igbo.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Kọwaa n'okwu nke gị: kedu ka oghere hue, saturation, na nha palet si ekpebi "nkwekọ"?
igbo.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Ndetu nhazi: akara nkwekọ nwere ọnọdụ 5 dị iche iche; wiil SVG na-egosi ebe palet ndị ahụ dị; enweghị akara "palet dị mma" — e mere ya otú ahụ n'ụzọ ezubere.
igbo.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — ụzọ nke ntụpọ dị n'obere okirikiri na-atụgharị n'ime nnukwu na-agbaso. Ụkpụrụ ahụ dabere na
igbo.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (nkewa nkịtị kacha ukwuu) nke redii abụọ ahụ. Mgbe R/r bụ mpaghara dị mfe, ị ga-enweta petal ole na ole; ọnụọgụgụ mgbagwoju anya na-emepụta ụzọ gbagọrọ agbagọ nke na-adịghị emegharị ma ọlị.
igbo.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Pịa ma ọ bụ dọrọ na kanvas ka ị mepụta mgbawa ntakịrị ihe
igbo.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Pịa ma dọrọ ka ị tụsaa agba na kanvas na-atụgharị
igbo.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: N'ime usoro na-atụgharị, ihe na-enweta ike ụgha na-achụ ha n'èzí nke kwekọrọ na ebe ha dị site n'etiti na square nke ọsọ akụkụ (ω²r).
igbo.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Nka ntụgharị nke ezie na-eji mmụba ọsọ na-adọta n'etiti gbasaa agba. Agba dị mkpirisi na-efe n'èzí ngwa ngwa; agba dị arọ na-emepụta akara mkpụmkpụ nke a na-achịkwa nke ọma.
igbo.why_it_s_beautiful: Ihe mere o ji maa mma:
igbo.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Nchikota nke mmegharị ntụgharị na ịdị arọ agba na-emepụta gburugburu okike na ụkpụrụ nnyonye anya. Ihe osise ntụgharị abụọ adịghị adị otu — ọ bụ ụdị
igbo.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: site n'ahịrị kwụ ọtọ. Site n'okirikiri na ihe mmụba 2, ị ga-enweta
igbo.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — akụkụ nwere ọdịdị obi nke a na-ahụ n'iko kọfị. Ihe mmụba 3 na-emepụta
igbo.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Ihe mmụba ndị dị elu na-emepụta ụkpụrụ gbagọrọ agbagọ nke
igbo.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: na-achịkwa: ntu N na-ejikọ na ntu (N × M) mod ngụkọta.
igbo.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Nka Anya) pụtara na 1960, ndị bidoro ya bụ
igbo.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Ọ na-eji otu ọhụụ mmadụ si arụ ọrụ mepụta aghụghọ mmegharị, jijiji, na omimi n'elu dị larịị.
igbo.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: na-apụta mgbe grid abụọ nkịtị dakọtara na obere akụkụ. Ụbụrụ gị enweghị ike idozi ụkpụrụ na-emegiderịta onwe ha, ọ na-emepụta akụkụ na ebili mmiri efu. Otu mmetụta a na-akpata ìhè “ọnụ ụzọ ụgbụ” n'ụfọdụ ákwà.
igbo.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: na-eme mgbe agba mmejupụta nwere saturation dị elu nọ n'akụkụ ibe ha. Ndị na-anabata agba n'anya gị na-asọ mpi, na-emepụta ọnụ na-ada ụda ma na-adịghị akwụsi ike — a na-akpọ nke a
igbo.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: n'ime retina bụ ụzọ nghọta ndị bụ isi. Ụkpụrụ mgbanaka gbara otu etiti gburugburu na-akpali mkpuchi anya na-akpaghị aka, na-eme ka ọrụ nka ahụ dị ka ọ na-eku ume ma na-akụ.
igbo.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (ma ọ bụ nkedo) na-ekpuchi ala nile site n'ọdịdị ndị dakọtara n'enweghị oghere ma ọ bụ nnyonye anya. Ọ bụ naanị ọdịdị nkịtị atọ nwere ike ikpuchi n'onwe ha:
igbo.equilateral_triangles: akụkụ atọ nwere akụkụ hà nhata
igbo.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) tụgharịrị nkedo dị mfe ka ọ bụrụ nka site n'ịgbagọ ọnụ taịlị. Ụzọ ya: gbagọọ otu akụkụ nke ọdịdị wee detuo mgbagọ ahụ n'akụkụ nke ọzọ, ka taịlị ndị ahụ ka na-adakọ nke ọma. Nke a bụ ntọala
igbo.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: na-eji nkedo taịlị nke ukwuu — na-ejikọta kpakpando, akụkụ isii, na ụkpụrụ jikọrọ onwe ha nke a na-ahụ na ụlọ alakụba dịka Alhambra. Ụkpụrụ ndị a na-agbaso iwu mgbakọ siri ike ebe ha na-emepụta mgbagwoju anya nke anya na-eju anya.
igbo.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Nkedo taịlị na-eji ọrụ atọ dị mkpa —
igbo.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (mkpugharị). Enwere ike ikewa nkedo taịlị ọ bụla site na nke ọ dabara n'ime 'otu 17 nke ụkpụrụ mgbidi' ndị a.
igbo.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Pịa taịlị ndị ahụ ka ị gbanwee agba ha
igbo.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: ka a na-emepụta site n'ịmegharị z = z² + c maka ntụpọ c ọ bụla n'ime ụgbọ ọnụọgụ mgbagwoju anya. Ntụpọ ebe |z| na-anọgide n'ime oke (ọ gafeghị 2) dị 'n'ime' ụyọkọ ahụ. Oke ya na-ekpughe
igbo.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: na-eji otu usoro ahụ mana ha na-edozi c ma na-agbanwe z mmalite. Ntụpọ Mandelbrot ọ bụla na-emepụta ụyọkọ Julia pụrụ iche — ntụpọ ndị dị n'ime Mandelbrot na-emepụta Julia jikọtara ọnụ; ndị dị n'èzí na-emepụta 'ụyọkọ Fatou' dịka ájá.
igbo.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: na-agbanwe mmegharị ahụ ka ọ bụrụ z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, na-emepụta ọdịdị na-enweghị nhata nke yiri ụgbọ mmiri na-ere ọkụ. Michael Michelitsch na Otto Rössler chọpụtara ya na 1992.
igbo.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: ka e wuru site na 'egwuregwu ọgba aghara': họrọ ntụpọ ọ bụla, wee wụọ ọkara ụzọ gaa n'akụkụ a họrọ na-atụghị anya ya, megharịa ya ugboro ugboro. N'ụzọ dị ịtụnanya, usoro a na-adịghị eche eche na-emepụta fractal nke yiri onwe ya nke ọma.
igbo.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) chepụtara okwu ahụ bụ 'fractal' site na Latin 'fractus' (gbajiri agbaji). O gosiri na ikpere oke osimiri, ugwu, akwara ọbara, na ahịa ụlọ akụ niile na-egosi jiometrị fractal —
igbo.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Pịa ugboro abụọ ka ị mebaa • Jiri wiil nkugharị mebaa ma ọ bụ belata
igbo.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Pixel ọ bụla na-agwakọta ìhè uhie, akwụkwọ ndụ, na acha anụnụ anụnụ n'ogo dị iche iche. Gradient na-agbanwe ụkpụrụ ndị a nwayọọ nwayọọ n'ime ohere.
igbo.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: na-emepụta gradient ndị hà nhata karị n'anya karịa RGB. Ịga site na uhie ruo acha anụnụ anụnụ na RGB na-agafe isi awọ na-adịghị mma; na HSL, ọ na-agafe odo odo na-egbuke egbuke — otú onye na-ese ihe ga-esi gwakọta ya.
igbo.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: dị ebe niile: ọdịda anyanwụ (mgbasa Rayleigh na-ekewa ogologo ebili ìhè), egwurugwu (ntụgharị ìhè na-ahazi ya site na ugboro), na omimi oke osimiri (mmiri na-ebu ụzọ mịchaa uhie, na-ahapụ acha anụnụ anụnụ miri emi).
igbo.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: na-agbagharị agba gburugburu otu ntụpọ etiti dịka wiil agba. A na-eji ha na chaatị okirikiri, ihe ntụgharị nbudata, na ngosi data. CSS tinyere nkwado conic-gradient naanị na 2020!
igbo.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: na-eji gradient mepụta omimi, duzie uche, ma kpalie mmetụta. Gradient site n'ọkụ ruo oyi na-egosi omimi (nlele ikuku); site n'ìhè ruo ọchịchịrị na-egosi ibu (chiaroscuro).
igbo.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Kọwaa ihe maka maapụ omimi ma ọ bụ ụdị elu maka ụkpụrụ...
igbo.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Ọcha = na-apụta n'ihu • Isi awọ = etiti • Ojii = ebe dị anya
igbo.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Anya gị abụọ dị ihe dị ka cm 6 n'ebe ọ bụla
igbo.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , ya mere nke ọ bụla na-ahụ ụwa site n'akụkụ dị ntakịrị iche. Ụbụrụ gị na-ejikọta nlele abụọ a ka ị ghọta
igbo.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (onyonyo Magic Eye™) na-ezobe ọdịdị 3D n'ime ụkpụrụ na-emegharị. Aghụghọ ya: ebe ihe zoro ezo dị 'nso', ụkpụrụ ahụ na-emegharị na
igbo.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; ebe ọ dị 'anya', oge ahụ na-adị ogologo. Ụbụrụ gị na-atụgharị ndịiche oge ndị a dịka omimi.
igbo.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) nke Tom Baccei na Cheri Smith rere ihe karịrị nde 25 n'ụwa niile. Ọ bụ Dr. Christopher Tyler bidoro usoro autostereogram ahụ na 1979.
igbo.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Iji hụ onyonyo ahụ: bịaruo ihu gị nso na ihuenyo, hapụ anya gị ka ọ dị jụụ ka ị na-ele anya 'n'ime' onyonyo ahụ ruo mgbidi dị anya, wee laghachi azụ nwayọọ nwayọọ. Ọdịdị 3D ga-apụta. A na-akpọ nke a
igbo.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: na-enwe nsogbu ịhụ stereogram n'ihi ọnọdụ dịka amblyopia (anya umengwụ), strabismus (anya gbagọrọ), ma ọ bụ ndịiche ndị ọzọ nke ọhụụ anya abụọ. Nke a bụ ihe kwesịrị ekwesị kpamkpam!
igbo.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Hapụ anya gị ka ọ dị jụụ ma lee anya 'n'ime' onyonyo ahụ ka ị hụ 3D
igbo.hold_your_face_close_to_the_screen: Bịaruo ihu gị nso na ihuenyo
igbo.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Hapụ anya gị ka ọ dị jụụ — gbalịa ile anya 'n'ime' onyonyo ahụ ruo mgbidi dị n'azụ ya
igbo.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Laghachi azụ nwayọọ nwayọọ. Ọdịdị 3D ga-apụta!
igbo.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Ndụmọdụ: ntụpọ nduzi abụọ dị n'elu kwesịrị ịpụta dịka atọ mgbe anya gị hazichara nke ọma
igbo.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Mepụta stereogram 3D na-akwaga site na nhazi mbụ, ihe osise gị, onyonyo ị bulitere, mgbanwe, ma ọ bụ maapụ omimi AI mepụtara!
igbo.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Sere maapụ omimi, weta ya dịka freem isi, wee sere nke ọzọ. Mmegharị ahụ ga-ejikọta ha.
igbo.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Bulite onyonyo isi awọ (ọcha = nso, ojii = ebe dị anya). A ga-eji mgbanwe ị họrọ mee ka ọ kwaga.
igbo.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Na-eme ka maapụ omimi si na taabụ Kwụsịrị kwaga site na mmetụta mgbanwe ị họrọ. Buru ụzọ gaa n'ọnọdụ Kwụsịrị ka ị sere maapụ omimi gị.
igbo.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Ndụmọdụ: Buru ụzọ sere maapụ omimi na taabụ Kwụsịrị, wee laghachi ebe a jiri mgbanwe mee ka ọ kwaga.
igbo.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Kọwaa ihe nkiri 3D, AI ga-emepụta maapụ omimi, wee jiri mgbanwe mee ka ọ kwaga.
igbo.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: dịka Bọọlụ kristal na-enwu na-ese n'elu mbara igwe...
igbo.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Jiri AI Mepụta Maapụ Omimi maka Mmegharị
igbo.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Mmegharị AI na-akpọ Gemini ka o hazie ọnọdụ ahụ, wee kpọọ Imagen ka o sere freem ọ bụla dịka maapụ omimi nke ya. Ihe dị ka sekọnd 5–7 maka freem ọ bụla; ọ naghị agafe oke ojiji.
igbo.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Mmepụta onyonyo site na AI adịghị. Jiri ọnọdụ Nhazi mbụ, Sere, Bulite, ma ọ bụ Gbanwee kama.
igbo.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Hapụ anya gị ka ọ dị jụụ ma lee anya 'n'ime' mmegharị ahụ ka ị hụ ọdịdị 3D ka ha na-akwaga
igbo.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Kwụsie anya gị ike na nlele 3D tupu ị pịa Kpọọ
igbo.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Ọsọ ndị dị ala (4–6 FPS) dị mfe idobe uche
igbo.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Nhazi Nkụ na Obi kacha mfe ịhụ ka ha na-akwaga
igbo.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: Enwere ike ibipụta GIF ahụ e bupụrụ freem n'otu n'otu dịka akwụkwọ ntụgharị!
